evals.name: Discover and document work tracking configuration
evals.prompt: Set up Clarity Engineering for a codebase that uses Linear for tracking, has a docs/ directory with ADRs and a CONTEXT.md, and uses pnpm for build/test. The repo has a .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md and uses conventional commits.
evals.expected_output: The agent discovers and documents the ticket system, reference resolution patterns, domain docs, validation commands, review workflow, and escalation policy. It keeps the setup lightweight and grounded in existing conventions.
assertions: Documents the ticket system as Linear
Documents validation commands from the repo
Produces a setup artifact or summary
Keeps setup lightweight and avoids configuration theatre

evals.name: Configure escalation policy with safe vs escalation-required actions
evals.prompt: Configure the automation policy for a repo where the team wants: local branches and tests to run automatically, but pushing, opening PRs, and moving Linear tickets should ask first.
evals.expected_output: The agent documents autonomous actions (local branches, tests) and escalation-required actions (push, open PR, move tickets) in the setup policy section.
assertions: Lists local branch creation as autonomous
